title: Better Ender Eye Recipe (BEER)
description: Changes the Ender-Eye-Crafting-Recipe to include Amethyst Shards, Magma Creme and Prismarine Crystals in the Ender Eye crafting recipe. (Recipe still needs Ender Pearl and Blaze powder)
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Makes%20Vanilla%20-%20more%20difficult%20-%20red)

This datapack changes the Ender-Eye Recipe to be a bit more difficult. 

The ender eye is crafted as follows:

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9519a17d5e5ea39be329362494be7b83fa67b2.jpeg)
Recipe is Shapeless (Can be arranged in any way you like)

So if you feel like Minecraft is a bit too easy or just want your friends to not rush the game as usual, This Datapack is for you!

Since v1.2.0 it also removes the old ender_eye crafting recipe out of the box!



<details>
<summary>Allowed Use</summary>

You are allowed to use this pack on your server and in your Modpack.

MODPACK:
No atteibution needs to be given. Both for private and "Commercial-" Use

SERVER:
No atrribution needs to be given, as long as the server doesn't explicitly profits from this datapack.
This datapack should not be used on Servers with P2W/P2P Aspects, especially not if this Datapack and it's functions are buyable on the server.

SOCIAL-MEDIA:
Tho not enforced, It would be nice if you could leave a link to this page in the description of your Video.
Thanks!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Planned</summary>

Planned Version Support:

1.20.x
1.19.x
</details>
